title: VRun VI
description:
Run a vision sequence in the current project.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Sequence	The name of a vision sequence in the
		 current project.

Outputs

Spel Ref
		 Out	Spel reference output for next VI to
		 use.

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.
notes: Refer to the Vision Guide 8.0 software manual for information on running vision sequences.
see_also:
VGetBool, VGetDbl, VGetInt, VGetStr, VSetBool, VSetDbl, VSetInt, VSetStr

VRun Example
